changes.value: ModeIndicator uses AppMode (interaction state) not KeymapMode, and renders unconditionally. Shows vim-style '-- NORMAL --' regardless of keymap.\n\nKey files: mode-indicator.tsx, app-mode-context.tsx, App.tsx:160
Bug: NORMAL mode footer shows in CUA/Emacs mode
